boundaries: no financial advice, recommendations, target allocations, trades, or return predictions
handoff: release owner handoff for v1.0.1 stabilization
next_steps: Replace REPO_URL_PLACEHOLDER with the public repository URL before publishing release notes.
Run the verification commands from a clean checkout and record results in the release owner notes.
Inspect demo/index.html, demo/public_readiness.md, and demo/final_handoff.md as the first-screen reviewer path.
Tag v1.0.1 only after tests, selfcheck, public-scan, and wheel smoke pass.

risks.owner_action: Use fixture-doctor with an explicit --as-of date before relying on a new static snapshot.
Regenerate command-matrix, release-manifest, artifact-catalog, and final-handoff after source or demo changes.
Run the wheel build and installed CLI smoke commands manually before tagging.
risks.risk: Packaging smoke not performed by automation

risks.owner_action: Reject changes that add live fetches, broker connectivity, orders, recommendations, target allocations, or return predictions.
risks.risk: Scope creep into advice or live-data behavior

safety: Research use only. This static report is not investment advice, does not recommend buys, sells, holds, target allocations, or trades, and uses only user-supplied fixture data.

verification_commands.expected: JSON reports ok=true with no missing required files or hygiene findings.
verification_commands.name: selfcheck

verification_commands.expected: JSON reports ok=true with no private terms or credential-shaped strings.
verification_commands.name: public-scan

verification_commands.expected: A fund_exposure_lookthrough wheel is created using the local zero-dependency backend.
verification_commands.name: wheel-build

verification_commands.command: python -m pip install --force-reinstall --no-deps dist/fund_exposure_lookthrough-1.0.1-py3-none-any.whl && fund-exposure-lookthrough --version && fund-exposure-lookthrough selfcheck --root .
verification_commands.expected: Installed CLI reports 1.0.1 and selfcheck passes.
verification_commands.name: wheel-smoke
